---
title: "Aerobic MBR Process Report"
subtitle: "ASM2d Simulation Results"
date: "{{ meta.report_date }}"
template: "{{ meta.template_name }}"
model: "ASM2d"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    css: report.css
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

<div class="report-header">
<div>

# Aerobic MBR Process Report

**Model:** ASM2d (19 components) | **Template:** {{ meta.template_name }}

</div>
<div class="report-meta">
<span class="label">Report Date</span>
<span>{{ meta.report_date }}</span>
<span class="label">Simulation ID</span>
<span>{{ meta.simulation_id }}</span>
</div>
</div>

## Process Performance

<div class="kpi-grid">
  <div class="kpi-card {{ data.diagnostics.cod_class }}">
    <div class="kpi-label">COD Removal</div>
    <div class="kpi-value">{{ data.performance.cod.removal_pct | round(1) }}</div>
    <div class="kpi-unit">%</div>
  </div>
  <div class="kpi-card {{ data.diagnostics.tn_class }}">
    <div class="kpi-label">TN Removal</div>
    <div class="kpi-value">{{ data.performance.nitrogen.tn_removal_pct | round(1) }}</div>
    <div class="kpi-unit">%</div>
  </div>
  <div class="kpi-card {{ data.diagnostics.tp_class }}">
    <div class="kpi-label">TP Removal</div>
    <div class="kpi-value">{{ data.performance.phosphorus.tp_removal_pct | round(1) }}</div>
    <div class="kpi-unit">%</div>
  </div>
  <div class="kpi-card kpi-ok">
    <div class="kpi-label">SRT</div>
    <div class="kpi-value">{{ data.performance.srt.SRT_days | round(1) }}</div>
    <div class="kpi-unit">days</div>
  </div>
</div>

## Diagnostic Summary

<div class="diag-panel">
  <p><span class="status-dot status-{{ data.diagnostics.cod_status }}"></span><strong>COD Removal</strong> {{ data.performance.cod.removal_pct | round(1) }}%</p>
  <p><span class="status-dot status-{{ data.diagnostics.nh4_status }}"></span><strong>NH4-N Effluent</strong> {{ data.effluent.NH4_mg_N_L | round(2) }} mg/L</p>
  <p><span class="status-dot status-{{ data.diagnostics.no3_status }}"></span><strong>NO3-N Effluent</strong> {{ data.effluent.NO3_mg_N_L | round(2) }} mg/L</p>
  <p><span class="status-dot status-{{ data.diagnostics.po4_status }}"></span><strong>PO4-P Effluent</strong> {{ data.effluent.PO4_mg_P_L | round(2) }} mg/L</p>
</div>

{% if data.thresholds.nh4_mg_L and data.effluent.NH4_mg_N_L > data.thresholds.nh4_mg_L %}
::: {.callout-warning}
NH4-N effluent ({{ data.effluent.NH4_mg_N_L | round(2) }} mg/L) exceeds threshold ({{ data.thresholds.nh4_mg_L }} mg/L).
:::
{% endif %}

{% if data.thresholds.no3_mg_L and data.effluent.NO3_mg_N_L > data.thresholds.no3_mg_L %}
::: {.callout-warning}
NO3-N effluent ({{ data.effluent.NO3_mg_N_L | round(2) }} mg/L) exceeds threshold ({{ data.thresholds.no3_mg_L }} mg/L).
:::
{% endif %}

{% if data.thresholds.po4_mg_L and data.effluent.PO4_mg_P_L > data.thresholds.po4_mg_L %}
::: {.callout-warning}
PO4-P effluent ({{ data.effluent.PO4_mg_P_L | round(2) }} mg/L) exceeds threshold ({{ data.thresholds.po4_mg_L }} mg/L).
:::
{% endif %}

## Influent/Effluent Comparison

| Parameter | Influent | Effluent | Removal |
|:----------|----------:|---------:|--------:|
{% for row in data.stream_comparison %}
| {{ row.parameter }} | {{ row.influent }} {{ row.unit }} | {{ row.effluent }} {{ row.unit }} | {{ row.removal_pct }}% |
{% endfor %}

## Flowsheet Diagram

{% if data.flowsheet.has_diagram %}
![System Flowsheet](flowsheet.svg){.flowsheet-diagram}
{% else %}
<div class="ts-placeholder">
[Flowsheet diagram not generated - run with output directory to generate]
</div>
{% endif %}

{% if data.flowsheet.units %}
### Unit Operations

| # | Unit ID | Type | Inlets | Outlets |
|--:|:--------|:-----|:-------|:--------|
{% for u in data.flowsheet.units %}
| {{ u.number }} | {{ u.id }} | {{ u.type }} | {{ u.inlet_ids | join(', ') }} | {{ u.outlet_ids | join(', ') }} |
{% endfor %}
{% endif %}

{% if data.flowsheet.streams %}
### Stream Mass Balance

| Stream | Flow (m³/d) | COD (mg/L) | TN (mg/L) | TP (mg/L) |
|:-------|------------:|-----------:|----------:|----------:|
{% for s in data.flowsheet.streams %}
| {{ s.id }} | {{ s.flow_m3_d | round(1) }} | {{ s.COD_mg_L | round(1) if s.COD_mg_L else 'N/A' }} | {{ s.TN_mg_L | round(1) if s.TN_mg_L else 'N/A' }} | {{ s.TP_mg_L | round(1) if s.TP_mg_L else 'N/A' }} |
{% endfor %}
{% endif %}

## Nitrogen Removal

<div class="two-col">
<div>

### Mass Balance

| Metric | Influent | Effluent | Removal |
|:-------|----------:|---------:|--------:|
| TN | {{ data.performance.nitrogen.tn_in_mg_L | round(1) }} | {{ data.performance.nitrogen.tn_out_mg_L | round(1) }} | {{ data.performance.nitrogen.tn_removal_pct | round(1) }}% |
| NH4-N | {{ data.performance.nitrogen.nh4_in_mg_L | round(1) }} | {{ data.performance.nitrogen.nh4_out_mg_L | round(2) }} | {{ data.performance.nitrogen.nh4_removal_pct | round(1) }}% |
| NO3-N | {{ data.performance.nitrogen.no3_in_mg_L | round(2) }} | {{ data.performance.nitrogen.no3_out_mg_L | round(2) }} | {{ data.performance.nitrogen.no3_removal_pct | round(1) }}% |

</div>
<div>

### Process Rates

| Metric | Value | Unit |
|:-------|------:|:-----|
| Nitrification | {{ data.performance.nitrogen.nitrification_rate | round(2) }} | mg N/L/h |
| Denitrification | {{ data.performance.nitrogen.denitrification_rate | round(2) }} | mg N/L/h |
| N2 Production | {{ data.effluent.N2_mg_N_L | round(2) }} | mg N/L |

</div>
</div>

## Phosphorus Removal

<div class="two-col">
<div>

### Mass Balance

| Metric | Influent | Effluent | Removal |
|:-------|----------:|---------:|--------:|
| TP | {{ data.performance.phosphorus.tp_in_mg_L | round(2) }} | {{ data.performance.phosphorus.tp_out_mg_L | round(2) }} | {{ data.performance.phosphorus.tp_removal_pct | round(1) }}% |
| PO4-P | {{ data.performance.phosphorus.po4_in_mg_L | round(2) }} | {{ data.performance.phosphorus.po4_out_mg_L | round(2) }} | {{ data.performance.phosphorus.po4_removal_pct | round(1) }}% |

</div>
<div>

### EBPR Activity

| Metric | Value | Unit |
|:-------|------:|:-----|
| PAO Biomass | {{ data.biomass.X_PAO_mg_COD_L | round(1) }} | mg COD/L |
| Polyphosphate | {{ data.biomass.X_PP_mg_P_L | round(2) }} | mg P/L |
| PHA Storage | {{ data.biomass.X_PHA_mg_COD_L | round(1) }} | mg COD/L |

</div>
</div>

## Biomass Inventory

### Active Biomass

| Component | Concentration (mg COD/L) | Description |
|:----------|-------------------------:|:------------|
| X_H | {{ data.biomass.X_H_mg_COD_L | round(1) }} | Heterotrophs |
| X_AUT | {{ data.biomass.X_AUT_mg_COD_L | round(1) }} | Autotrophs (nitrifiers) |
| X_PAO | {{ data.biomass.X_PAO_mg_COD_L | round(1) }} | Phosphorus accumulators |
| X_S | {{ data.biomass.X_S_mg_COD_L | round(1) }} | Slowly biodegradable |
| X_I | {{ data.biomass.X_I_mg_COD_L | round(1) }} | Inert particulates |

### Sludge Characteristics

| Metric | Value | Unit |
|:-------|------:|:-----|
| MLSS | {{ data.biomass.MLSS_mg_L | round(0) }} | mg/L |
| MLVSS | {{ data.biomass.MLVSS_mg_L | round(0) }} | mg/L |
| VSS/TSS | {{ data.biomass.VSS_TSS_ratio | round(2) }} | - |
| SVI | {{ data.biomass.SVI_mL_g | round(0) }} | mL/g |

## Reactor Configuration

<div class="two-col">
<div>

### Zone Volumes

| Zone | Volume (m3) | DO (mg/L) |
|:-----|------------:|----------:|
| Anoxic | {{ data.reactor.V_anoxic_m3 | round(0) }} | 0 |
| Aerobic | {{ data.reactor.V_aerobic_m3 | round(0) }} | {{ data.reactor.DO_aerobic_mg_L | round(1) }} |
| MBR | {{ data.reactor.V_mbr_m3 | round(0) }} | {{ data.reactor.DO_mbr_mg_L | round(1) }} |
| **Total** | **{{ data.reactor.V_total_m3 | round(0) }}** | - |

</div>
<div>

### Recycle Flows

| Stream | Flow (m3/d) | Ratio |
|:-------|------------:|------:|
| RAS | {{ data.reactor.Q_ras_m3_d | round(0) }} | {{ data.reactor.RAS_ratio | round(1) }}x |
| IR | {{ data.reactor.Q_ir_m3_d | round(0) }} | {{ data.reactor.IR_ratio | round(1) }}x |
| WAS | {{ data.reactor.Q_was_m3_d | round(0) }} | - |

</div>
</div>

## Process Parameters

<dl class="spec-block">
<dt>Influent Flow</dt>
<dd>{{ data.influent.flow_m3_d | round(0) }} m3/d</dd>
<dt>HRT (Total)</dt>
<dd>{{ data.performance.HRT_hours | round(1) }} hours</dd>
<dt>SRT</dt>
<dd>{{ data.performance.srt.SRT_days | round(1) }} days</dd>
<dt>F/M Ratio</dt>
<dd>{{ data.performance.FM_ratio | round(3) }} kg COD/kg VSS/d</dd>
<dt>Oxygen Transfer</dt>
<dd>{{ data.performance.OTR_kg_O2_d | round(1) }} kg O2/d</dd>
</dl>

## Simulation Status

<dl class="spec-block">
<dt>Status</dt>
<dd>{{ data.simulation.status }}</dd>
<dt>Converged At</dt>
<dd>{{ data.simulation.converged_at_days | round(1) }} days</dd>
<dt>Duration</dt>
<dd>{{ data.simulation.duration_days | round(1) }} days</dd>
<dt>Method</dt>
<dd>{{ data.simulation.method }}</dd>
</dl>

## Time Series

### Effluent Nutrients

<div class="ts-placeholder">
{{ data.time_series.nutrient_plot }}
</div>

### Reactor DO and MLSS

<div class="ts-placeholder">
{{ data.time_series.reactor_state_plot }}
</div>

---

<div class="footnote">
Generated by QSDsan Engine MCP | ASM2d Process Model | {{ meta.report_date }}
</div>
